title: Sharpen the flagship products
note: Push ReceiptPulse and LumenStack AI further with stronger reporting, cleaner product routes, and clearer proof of depth.

title: Keep the portfolio repo-aware
note: Make project manifests, branding assets, and portfolio storytelling stay aligned so strong repos update here cleanly.

title: Level up deployment maturity
note: Move the best builds toward CI/CD, container workflows, observability, and more production-like release discipline.
